hero.title: Andrea Losavio
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer & Tech Partner
hero.description: Helping startups and companies build solid, scalable digital products focused on growth

makingAnImpact.title: Making an impact
makingAnImpact.subtitle: How I supported teams and clients grow, build, and move forward

items.brandIdentity: Helped a client develop a <highlight>strong brand identity</highlight> that allowed them to reach a wider audience and attract more customers
items.infrastructure: Supported a company in building a <highlight>robust infrastructure</highlight>, laying solid foundations for future projects
items.platforms: Collaborated long-term with a company to develop some of the most <highlight>widely used platforms</highlight> today
items.transition: Assisted a startup during a <highlight>critical product transition</highlight> phase, ensuring a smooth evolution
items.investment: Helped a startup secure almost <highlight>€2M investment</highlight> round through product development and technical strategy

recrowd.name: Recrowd S.r.l.
recrowd.quote: "Our collaboration with Andrea was consistently solid from start to finish. Over time, he became a key contributor to the platform's evolution — improving performance, refining the platform, and ensuring a smooth, reliable user experience."

quido.name: Quido S.r.l.
quido.description: artificial intelligence for private equity and M&A
quido.quote: "Andrea managed to make sense of a highly complex product like Quido — where finance meets AI — with impressive clarity. He helped shape a sophisticated yet accessible interface that highlights the intelligence behind the platform. A professional who understands both data logic and the importance of design and user experience."

ravenn.name: Ravenn S.r.l.
ravenn.description: event logistics and hospitality management platform
ravenn.quote: "Our collaboration was short but impactful. Andrea handled the entire platform end-to-end, delivering a smooth and intuitive experience for managing logistics, check-ins, and hospitality."

studioBargiggia.name: Studio Bargiggia
studioBargiggia.quote: "Our previous website suffered from poor design, confusing navigation, mismatched colors, and performance issues. He completely rebuilt it from the ground up, creating a clean, fast, and modern showcase site that truly represents our firm. Thanks to his work, our online presence finally matches the professionalism of our studio."

brainplatform.name: Brainplatform S.r.l.
brainplatform.quote: "Worked on a short-term collaboration to support our digital product initiatives."

anonymous.name: Anonymous
anonymous.quote: "He built a platform that completely transformed how we work: interactive maps, tobacconist management, agent assignments, and an admin dashboard — all in one place. He perfectly balanced a fast and user-friendly interface. His focus on performance and user experience is what truly set his work apart."

quote.text: Every moment in business happens only once. The next Bill Gates will not build an operating system. The next Larry Page or Sergey Brin won't make a search engine. And the next Mark Zuckerberg won't create a social network. If you are copying these guys, you aren't learning from them.
quote.author: Peter Thiel
quote.book: Zero to One: Notes on Startups, or How to Build the Future

youCouldBeNext.title: You could be next.
youCouldBeNext.subtitle: Every great digital product in that timeline started with a single conversation

leftText.line1: You've seen what I've helped others achieve — now I'm ready to discover
leftText.line2: Whether you need to validate an idea, scale a product, or tackle a complex technical challenge, I have the experience to guide you there.

youCouldBeNext.keepScrolling: Keep scrolling to read what clients say about working with me.
